selected_issue.issue: Missing per-key contract-diagnostics type coverage metrics in replay assessment
selected_issue.title: Replay summary checked key presence only and lacked type-validity instrumentation

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Current evidence on agent-base showed no unresolved ranks 1-4 issues (structural violations: 0, canonical tests passing, no replay mismatches, no high-frequency invariant failures). Therefore the highest unresolved bounded issue was rank 5: missing instrumentation blocking diagnosis, specifically lack of per-key type-validity visibility for required contract diagnostics.

files_changed.change: Added contract diagnostics expected type descriptors and per-key type-valid/invalid counts + valid rates.
Added required schema properties for diagnostics type-coverage output.
Extended stage1 assertions to require and validate type-coverage metrics.

validation_performed.result: Includes contract_diagnostics_expected_types, contract_diagnostics_key_type_valid_counts, contract_diagnostics_key_type_invalid_counts, and contract_diagnostics_key_type_valid_rates with valid=6, invalid=0, rate=1.0 for all required keys.

before_after_evidence.before: Replay assessment reported required-key presence only and had no per-key type validity metrics.
before_after_evidence.after: Replay assessment now reports expected types and per-key type validity/invalidity counts and rates; canonical tests remain fully passing.

unresolved_risks: Type checks do not validate semantic correctness of values.
Small fixtures can miss semantic-quality issues that appear only in broader replay corpora.
stop_reason: Selected rank-5 instrumentation gap fixed with minimal bounded changes and repeated validation; further semantic-diagnostics expansion is outside this single-issue maintenance scope.
